benefits.description: Vision improved significantly; reportedly tested at 20/0 or off-the-charts by eye doctor, better than anyone they had seen. Previously 20/10 as a kid, now mid-40s with exceptional vision.
Dry eyes resolved, attributed partly to the peptide stack

protocol_notes: User has been biohacking for a long time. Does at least one cycle per year. Pairs visoluten/vision combo with vitamins, antioxidants, and astaxanthin. Primary motivation was brain and blood vessel peptides, not just vision. Notes that people with serious eye issues needed to keep taking it continuously.
